---
name: Propose a new field
about: A question that should be in the questionnaire but isn't. Open an issue before a PR.
title: "[field] "
labels: field-proposal
---

**Proposed field name (camelCase)**
<!-- e.g. supportsZeroKnowledgeEncryption -->

**Section**
<!-- profile | security_practices | saas_technical | on_prem_technical | pro_services | managed_services -->

**Type**
<!-- string | text | email | phone | url | country | boolean | enum | integer -->

**What it asks (1 line)**
<!-- en + de if you can -->

**Legal basis**
<!-- e.g. NIS2 Art. 21(2)(d), CIR 2024/2690 §5.1.4(g), BSI IT-Grundschutz BES.5.A11 -->

**Why this belongs in the base questionnaire and not as a sector extension**
<!-- One paragraph. -->
